Event: Titanic Excavation
Event Date: 16/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: O46
Crimson Night Orb

Once in a while for 4 sec., the enemy unit with the greatest current health is hit with a beam of light every second, becoming afflicted with improved withering. The target has 3 random positive effects removed from them, and all their stats are reduced by 20% for 4 sec. That enemy unit also receives pure damage equal to 20% of their maximum health. Stacks up to 3 times. All enemy units in a small radius around the beam's primary target additionally receive magic damage equal to 150% of the orb owner's spell power.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
